name: Crypto Tax Calculator
metaTitle: Crypto Tax Calculator — 30% Flat Tax, 1% TDS, Real Returns | c7xai
metaDescription: Calculate real crypto returns after India's 30% flat tax, 1% TDS, and inflation. Includes staking income tax and wash sale rules.
shortDescription: Real crypto returns after India's harsh tax regime

faq.question: How is crypto taxed in India?
faq.answer: India taxes crypto gains at a flat 30% rate under Section 115BBE — no slab benefit, no loss set-off against other income. Plus 1% TDS on transfers above ₹10L under Section 194S.

faq.question: Can I offset crypto losses against other income?
faq.answer: No. India's wash sale rule for crypto means losses cannot be offset against gains from any other asset class. You can only carry forward crypto losses to offset future crypto gains.

faq.question: How is staking income taxed?
faq.answer: Staking rewards are taxed as 'income from other sources' at your slab rate, not at the 30% crypto rate.
